hero_subtitle: SFTY preserves traceable, role-based audit logs that link provider outputs, compliance decisions, and evidence to meet institutional trust and bank due diligence requirements.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Enterprise teams face challenges maintaining clear access controls and audit evidence across multiple compliance tools. This gap weakens traceability and complicates due diligence, making audit readiness difficult to demonstrate.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes audit logs, access controls and evidence across compliance systems so VASPs can maintain traceability, support institutional due diligence and demonstrate audit readiness with stronger governance.
workflow_title: From access policy to audit log
workflow_description: SFTY structures role-based permissions and system actions into detailed audit logs that preserve evidence and support institutional compliance review and trust.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented logs. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY consolidates disparate compliance data into traceable audit logs that support enterprise governance, bank due diligence, and defensible review for regulated digital asset businesses.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with an institutional compliance layer that supports evidence integrity, role-based access, and bank due diligence within scalable, controlled deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enterprise audit logging workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how audit logs preserve compliance decisions and evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how role-based access controls support audit readiness
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects audit trails for bank due diligence
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise audit logging?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer providing structured audit logs, role-based access, evidence integrity and governance to meet institutional audit and trust requirements in digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle compliance case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured cases, supports decision logging, evidence collection and review workflows to help compliance teams manage digital asset risk efficiently and transparently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence with secured audit logs, supporting traceability and review readiness for regulatory inspections and internal governance.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting outputs into one operational workflow without disrupting current compliance infrastructure.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by turning diverse data and alerts into connected workflows, not replacing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening systems.
final_title: Review enterprise audit logging with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY preserves role-based audit logs linking provider outputs, decisions and evidence for institutional trust and due diligence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
